archetypes.name: people evidence replay
archetypes.trigger: people signal changes while preparing context is stale
archetypes.expected: block release until cited evidence is regenerated

archetypes.name: preparing boundary probe
archetypes.trigger: preparing handoff crosses a policy or trust boundary
archetypes.expected: route to reviewer with evidence packet

archetypes.name: text-message regression harness
archetypes.trigger: text-message behavior regresses against the last accepted fixture
archetypes.expected: open a regression issue with trace and benchmark delta

archetypes.name: court operator packet
archetypes.trigger: court output needs a human-readable audit packet
archetypes.expected: accept only if decision claims cite fixture evidence
